message.content:
@startuml
title SignUp Flow

actor Client
participant Mobile
participant "SMS Gateway" as SMS
participant "Push Gateway" as Push
database DigitalDB as DB
participant "Keycloak + Extension" as KC

Client -> Mobile : 1 Enter PhoneNumber, Birthday
Client -> Mobile : 2 Enter Password

Mobile -> KC : 3 POST /auth/signup (PhoneNumber, Birthday)
KC -> DB : 4 findClientRecord(PhoneNumber, Birthday): ClientRecord
DB --> KC : 5 ClientRecord

alt [ClientRecord is NOT found]
  KC --> Mobile : 6 HTTP 202
  KC -> KC : 7 saveInOTPContext(ClientRecord.id)
  KC -> KC : 8 generateAndSaveOTP(): OTP
  KC --> Mobile : 9 HTTP 202
  KC -> SMS : 10 sendSMS(phone=PhoneNumber, data=OTP)
  SMS --> Mobile : 11 SMS with OTP
  Mobile -> Push : 12 getPushToken(): Push Token
  Push --> Mobile : 13 Push Token
  Mobile -> Mobile : 14 generateKeys(): [PublicKey, PrivateKey]
end

Client -> Mobile : 15 Enter OTP
Mobile -> KC : 16 POST /auth/signup/complete (OTP, Password, Push Token, PublicKey)

KC -> KC : 17 validateOTP(OTP)
KC -> DB : 18 updateUser(ClientId, KeycloakUserId)
DB --> KC : 19
KC -> DB : 20 createMobileDevice(ClientId, Push Token, PublicKey)
DB --> KC : 21
KC -> KC : 22 generateJWT(scope="regular_user"): JWT
KC --> Mobile : 23 HTTP 200 {jwt: JWT}

@enduml
